moduleDescription: This module implements path handling like os module but works at only compile-time. This module works even when cross compiling to OS that is not supported by os module.

entries.name: staticFileExists
entries.code:
proc staticFileExists(filename: string): bool {.compileTime, raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description:
Returns true if filename exists and is a regular file or symlink.

Directories, device files, named pipes and sockets return false.

entries.name: staticDirExists
entries.code:
proc staticDirExists(dir: string): bool {.compileTime, raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Returns true if the directory dir exists. If dir is a file, false is returned. Follows symlinks.

entries.name: PathComponent
entries.code:
PathComponent = enum
  pcFile,                   ## path refers to a file
  pcLinkToFile,             ## path refers to a symbolic link to a file
  pcDir,                    ## path refers to a directory
  pcLinkToDir                ## path refers to a symbolic link to a directory
entries.description:
Enumeration specifying a path component.

See also:

  • walkDirRec
  • FileInfo

entries.name: staticWalkDir
entries.description:
Walks over the directory dir and returns a seq with each directory or file in dir. The component type and full path for each item are returned.

Walking is not recursive.

  • If relative is true (default: false) the resulting path is shortened to be relative to dir, otherwise the full path is returned.
